creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
With that library preloaded I can boot kodi. The software seems to run smooth (menus, sound, etc), but I tried with a couple of videos and there is extreme flickering. As if every few frames of video there is a completely black frame.

Tomorrow I will provide the output of glxinfo, I will need to install mesa-demos.

Additionally, that small computer (a small ION computer with an nvidia card) was installed from packages a couple of months ago (from Q1). Why would I need the preloaded library now?

Thanks!
